title: Excalibur | Botany Pots support
description: This resource pack redraws the Botany Pots mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- DarkhaxDev - Creator of Botany pots
